Home Ductless AC Repair & Installation

Ductless AC Repair & Installation in San Diego

Professional Ductless Mini Split Installation

With over 10 years of experience, EZ Heat & Air provides expert ductless air conditioner repair and installation services across San Diego. Our energy-efficient solutions offer zone-specific temperature control for maximum comfort.

Ductless mini-splits are an ideal solution for homes without existing ductwork or for specific room additions. They are quiet, efficient, and provide superior air quality.

Trust our highly skilled technicians to ensure your system runs smooth and reliable. Contact us today for a professional consultation and upfront pricing.

San Diego Ductless AC Services by EZ Heat and Air

Ductless Mini Split AC Installation

Professional Guidance From Selection To Installation Within Your Premises. We Ensure Perfect Unit Placement For Maximum Efficiency.

Ductless Air Conditioner Repair

Our Technicians Are Capable Of Repairing All Types And Brands Of Mini-Split Systems, Including Refrigerant Recharges And Electrical Fixes.

Ductless Mini Split AC Maintenance

Regular Servicing Is Essential For Longevity And Performance. We Provide Deep Cleaning And Comprehensive System Checks.

Ductless Air Conditioner Installation EZ Heat and Air: Your One Stop Solutions Provider

Ductless mini-split units are complex systems that require highly skilled technicians for proper installation and repair. At EZ Heat & Air, we provide rapid, affordable service to ensure your cooling system works flawlessly.

Whether you're looking to upgrade your current cooling or need a fix for an existing unit, we are your one-stop solutions provider. We handle everything from electrical connections to outdoor unit mounting with meticulous care.

Experience the benefits of personalized comfort and lower energy bills today. Trust our NATE-certified experts for all your ductless AC needs in San Diego.

24/7

Service

Same-day Plumbing Service For Any Issue Or Concern Related To Leakage, Clogging, Or Malfunctioning Of Appliances.

FREE

Estimate

Request a quote and get a free estimate for installation, repair, and replacement services from professionals.

FREE

Service Call

From plumbing repairs to full replacements, connect with our experts to inquire about services at zero charges.

15%

Discount Available

15% Off to the Police, Military, Fire Seniors and Teachers for Services up to $1000.

FINANCING

Available

Overcome financial barriers and keep your plumbing system up to date with our alternative financing options.

Don’t Let Plumbing Issues Interrupt Your Comfort & Budget

CALL EXPERTS NOW (760) 392 7616

What Our Clients Say About Us

"I’ve had my air conditioner maintained by this company for years. They always provide great service, and my system runs efficiently because of their routine checks. Their team is knowledgeable, and I always feel confident in their work."

Mark T. - San Diego

Why Choose Ductless Mini Split Air Conditioner Installation Unit?

  • Personalized Temperature Control: Adjust settings for each room independently.
  • Energy Efficiency: Save on utility bills with modern, efficient technology.
  • Quiet Operation: Enjoy a peaceful indoor environment without noisy components.
  • Improved Air Quality: Multi-stage filters trap dust, pollen, and allergens.
  • Cost-Effectiveness: Lower installation costs compared to full ducted systems.

Experience architectural flexibility and enhancement of property value with our professional installation services.

FAQs

Ductless AC installation typically costs between $3,000 and $15,000, depending on the number of indoor units and the complexity of the installation.

Key benefits include high energy efficiency, zone-specific temperature control, improved indoor air quality, and flexible installation without ductwork.

With proper maintenance, a high-quality ductless air conditioning system can last between 15 and 20 years.

You should consider replacement if repair costs approach 50% of the cost of a new system or if the unit is over 10 years old and frequently breaking down.

Essential maintenance includes cleaning air filters monthly and scheduling professional servicing at least once a year.
